hero.subtitle: High-performance time series data platform with built-in anomaly detection, forecasting, and real-time monitoring.
hero.feature1Desc: Millions of data points per second with sub-millisecond latency
hero.feature2Desc: Built-in anomaly detection and forecasting with ML
hero.feature3Desc: End-to-end encryption, RBAC, and comprehensive audit logs

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade features for modern time series applications
features.highPerformanceDesc: Handle millions of data points per second with sub-millisecond query latency. Optimized for high-throughput IoT workloads.
features.realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Monitor and analyze your time series data in real-time with powerful visualization tools and customizable dashboards.
features.aiForecastingDesc: Multiple ML algorithms including ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM, and Transformer models for accurate time series predictions.
features.anomalyDetectionDesc: AI-powered anomaly detection identifies unusual patterns automatically. Statistical and ML-based detection methods.
features.enterpriseSecurityDesc: End-to-end encryption, role-based access control (RBAC), API key management, and secure session handling.
features.restfulApiDesc: Easy-to-use REST API for seamless integration with your existing applications. Full CRUD operations and query capabilities.

gettingStarted.title: Get Started in Minutes
gettingStarted.subtitle: Set up your time series database platform with our streamlined onboarding
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Sign up for a free account and set up your organization. No credit card required.
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Connect your IoTDB instance or start fresh. Import from CSV, JSON, or use the REST API.
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Set up alerts, create dashboards, and configure AI models for forecasting and detection.
gettingStarted.step4Desc: Enable automated monitoring, API integrations, and scale your infrastructure as needed.
gettingStarted.noCreditCard: No credit card required · 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about IoTDB Enhanced
faq.a1: IoTDB Enhanced is an enterprise-grade time series database platform built on Apache IoTDB. It provides real-time analytics, AI-powered forecasting, anomaly detection, and a modern web interface for managing your IoT data at scale.
faq.a2: Our platform uses multiple machine learning algorithms including ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM, and Transformer models. You can train models on your historical time series data and generate accurate predictions with confidence intervals.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We implement enterprise-grade security including encryption at rest and in transit, role-based access control (RBAC), API key management, and secure session management.
faq.q4: Can I integrate with my existing systems?
faq.a4: Yes. IoTDB Enhanced provides a RESTful API, WebSocket support for real-time updates, and native IoTDB protocol compatibility. You can also use our SDKs and integrate with popular data pipelines.
faq.a5: You can deploy on any cloud platform (AWS, GCP, Azure) using managed services like AWS RDS, ElastiCache, or Cloud SQL. We provide comprehensive deployment guides for Docker, Kubernetes, and traditional VM setups.
faq.a6: Yes. Our Enterprise plan includes dedicated support, SLA guarantees, custom integrations, and priority access to new features. Contact our sales team for more information.
faq.contactSupport: Contact our support team for personalized assistance

about.title: About Us
about.heroSubtitle: We are dedicated to providing the most powerful time series data analytics platform for the industrial IoT domain, empowering teams to make data-driven decisions at scale.
about.missionDescription1: IoTDB Enhanced is dedicated to making time series data analytics simple, powerful, and accessible. We believe that every piece of data generated by industrial devices contains immense value — our mission is to help you discover and leverage that value.
about.missionDescription2: By integrating cutting-edge AI technology, we provide not only data storage and query capabilities, but also prediction, early warning, and intelligent analysis features — helping enterprises identify and solve problems before they occur.
about.coreValuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we build
about.securityFirstDesc: Data security is our top priority. We employ enterprise-grade encryption, access control, and audit mechanisms to keep your data safe at all times.
about.pursuitOfExcellenceDesc: We continuously optimize performance, improve user experience, and introduce the latest technologies to keep our platform at the industry's leading edge.
about.customerFirstDesc: We listen to our users, respond quickly to needs, and continuously improve our product to ensure every user gets the best possible experience.
about.leadershipSubtitle: Seasoned experts from world-class technology companies
about.joinJourneySubtitle: We are looking for talented individuals to join our team
